motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Full Stack, React, TypeScript, Node.js, SQL, JavaScript
empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Full-Stack Web App Developers (JavaScript/TypeScript + Python or Node) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build interactive browser-based applications within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide full-stack engineering expertise, architectural judgment, and quality control to ensure web apps are functional, robust, and ready for real users. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in modern frontend frameworks, backend APIs, databases, and shipping interactive web products end-to-end. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Full-Stack Web App Developer, you'll design, build, and refine browser-based applications with real logic, state, persistence, and user input — from habit trackers and budgeting tools to internal dashboards, mini-SaaS tools, and AI-powered apps. You may also work on standalone Python applications and data-processing scripts that sit alongside or behind these products. Key Responsibilities Build interactive web applications with frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, or similar) and a backend API (Python/FastAPI/Flask or Node/Express) Design and implement data models, schemas, and persistence layers using SQL (PostgreSQL, SQLite) or NoSQL stores Implement authentication, sessions, and basic role-based access where needed Integrate third-party APIs and AI/LLM services

empleos.descripcion: About Flatiron is a global remote software development company with engineers located around the world. We unite experts from diverse backgrounds and experiences in a collaborative culture to deliver exceptional products and services for our clients. As a forward-thinking software engineering company, we provide industry-leading solutions to complex problems in both the US and the UK. Operating in a fast-paced, agile environment, we specialize in software consulting for our clients. We offer a stimulating and rewarding environment for our team members. We value innovation, continuous learning, and professional growth, and we strive to create a workplace where everyone can thrive. Join us at Flatiron and be a part of a team that is shaping the future of software development. Job Summary This is a full-time fully remote working opportunity where you will be working as part of a Scrum team which requires working closely with other software engineers, stakeholders and contributors on the project. Working with respect to the US timezone is a requirement for the position. Attending meetings, being actively involved in the decision making process and collaborating with all of these stakeholders are essential parts of this position. Responsibilities Design and implement scalable, high-performance full stack applications with a strong emphasis on backend architecture. Lead and contribute to the integration of AI/ML features into products, collaborating closely with data scientists and engineers. Develop robust backend services and APIs using Python or Node.js (Express, NestJS). Contribute to frontend development using React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript practices. Identify, prioritize, and execute tasks throughout the software development lifecycle. Debug, optimize, and maint

empleos.descripcion: Estamos buscando un Desarrollador Backend altamente capacitado y orientado al detalle para unirse a nuestro equipo. En este puesto, serás responsable de desarrollar, mantener y optimizar aplicaciones del lado del servidor, bases de datos y APIs que respalden sistemas escalables y de alto rendimiento. El candidato ideal siente pasión por el desarrollo de software, la resolución de problemas y la creación de soluciones backend confiables que impulsen experiencias de usuario fluidas. Trabajarás en estrecha colaboración con desarrolladores frontend, equipos de producto y otros ingenieros para diseñar e implementar aplicaciones eficientes, seguras y escalables. Esta posición requiere una sólida experiencia técnica, pensamiento analítico y la capacidad de desenvolverse eficazmente en un entorno dinámico y colaborativo. Responsabilidades Principales Desarrollar, mantener y optimizar sistemas backend y aplicaciones del lado del servidor. Diseñar y administrar APIs, bases de datos y la arquitectura de las aplicaciones. Crear sistemas y servicios escalables, seguros y de alto rendimiento. Colaborar con desarrolladores frontend y equipos multidisciplinarios para integrar componentes orientados al usuario. Escribir código limpio, eficiente y fácil de mantener, siguiendo las mejores prácticas de desarrollo. Diagnosticar, depurar y resolver problemas relacionados con el backend y cuellos de botella de rendimiento. Optimizar consultas a bases de datos y el rendimiento de las aplicaciones. Implementar buenas prácticas de seguridad y protección de datos. Participar en procesos de pruebas, despliegue y revisión de código. Mantener documentación técnica y contribuir a la mejora continua de los sistemas. Habilidades y Experiencia Requeridas Experiencia comprobada como Desarrollador Backend

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: React, Front End, JavaScript, Git
empleos.descripcion: We are looking for a highly skilled Front-End Engineer with strong expertise in React and Next.js to build and maintain enterprise-grade web applications. The ideal candidate has experience developing scalable, data-intensive platforms, understands how front-end applications interact with APIs and authentication systems, and is comfortable working in a fully remote, English-speaking environment. Requirements 6+ years of professional experience with React (8+ years if no Bachelor's degree). Strong hands-on experience with React Hooks, Functional Components, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). Proven experience with Next.js, including SSR, CSR, routing, and environment-based configurations. Experience consuming secure REST APIs using JWT, OAuth, or similar authentication methods. Strong understanding of RBAC and authorization concepts. Experience optimizing front-end performance and working with large datasets. Proficiency with Git workflows, pull requests, and code reviews. Strong English communication skills (written and verbal). Ability to work independently while maintaining visibility and accountability in a remote environment. Nice to Have Experience with AG Grid Enterprise or similar data-grid solutions. GraphQL experience. Experience with Azure AD / Entra ID. Background in SaaS, multi-tenant applications, financial systems, analytics, or data visualization platforms.

empleos.descripcion: Full-Stack Software Engineer About the Opportunity We are looking for a Full-Stack Software Engineer to join a fast-growing technology company building a high-scale digital platform used by hundreds of thousands of users. This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys taking full ownership of features—from concept to production—and is comfortable working across frontend, backend, and data layers. You'll collaborate with cross-functional teams to build scalable products, improve platform reliability, and contribute to an engineering culture focused on quality, automation, and continuous delivery. Key Responsibilities End-to-End Feature Ownership Design, develop, test, and deploy features across the full technology stack. Own services, APIs, frontend components, and system integrations from planning through production. Ensure applications are scalable, reliable, secure, accessible, and maintainable. Full-Stack Development Build backend services using modern Node.js frameworks. Develop responsive and intuitive user interfaces for web and mobile applications. Design APIs and database models that support long-term scalability. Collaborate closely with Product, Design, QA, and DevOps teams throughout the development lifecycle. Engineering Excellence Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code. Implement unit, integration, and end-to-end tests. Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering best practices. Continuously improve application performance, reliability, and developer experience. Reduce technical debt through thoughtful refactoring and architecture improvements. Platform Reliability Monitor production systems and troubleshoot issues. Improve observability through logging, metrics, and tracing. Participate in incident response and postmortem reviews. Sup

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Node.js, TypeScript, Full Stack, Front End, Back End
empleos.descripcion: Buscamos un desarrollador Fullstack Senior (Node.js + Angular) para empresa líder en fintech. Importante: Posición remota pero deben residir en Córdoba o Buenos Aires (con facilidad para ir a las oficinas y tener encuentros presenciales por cuatrimestre) Tecnologías clave: Node.js, Angular, AWS (EKS/Lambda) ¿Qué desafío te espera? Buscamos a una persona apasionada por la arquitectura y el desarrollo de software, con un enfoque fullstack senior, para sumarse a un equipo que construye soluciones escalables de alto impacto. Más allá de tirar código, buscamos a un referente técnico hands-on: alguien con la autonomía necesaria para tomar decisiones de arquitectura, proponer mejoras y garantizar la robustez del producto. Vas a trabajar en una infraestructura moderna basada en AWS, colaborando directamente con producto, UX, proveedores y negocio, siendo el dueño técnico de tus desarrollos. Stack tecnológico Backend: Node.js (Fastify), API REST, arquitecturas orientadas a eventos y seguridad avanzada. Frontend: Angular (últimas versiones), TypeScript, RxJS, SCSS. Cloud: AWS (Expertise en EKS, Lambda, ECS, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, Cloudfront, CloudWatch). Testing: Foco en calidad con Jest y Cypress. Requisitos +6 años de experiencia real como desarrollador/a fullstack en entornos complejos. Sólidos conocimientos y autonomía en Node.js y Angular de forma principal. Experiencia avanzada diseñando e integrando APIs REST y servicios en la nube (AWS es excluyente para este seniority). Criterio técnico: maestría en buenas prácticas, clean code y patrones de diseño. Capacidad de análisis: entendimiento funcional para traducir necesidades de negocio en soluciones técnicas eficientes. Excelente comunicación y capacidad para canalizar soluciones dentro del equipo.

The ideal candidate will have excellent data entry skills, strong attention to detail, and the ability to work independently. This is a full-time position with flexible working hours. Dedicated to delivering exceptional service and maintaining organized business operations, our company is seeking a detail-oriented Administrative Data Entry File Clerk to join our team. If you excel at managing records, entering data accurately, and working independently in a remote environment, this opportunity may be the perfect fit for you. In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining digital files, updating databases, organizing administrative records, and ensuring information is entered accurately and efficiently. Your attention to detail, reliability, and commitment to data accuracy will play an important role in supporting daily operations and helping our team stay organized and productive. Â Key responsibilities: Â Intake & indexing. Receive files from shared inboxes, portals, internal ticketing tools, and cloud folders. Confirm document type, required fields, signatures, and attachments. Index each record using standard metadata (client/project ID, date, document category, version, region). Â Document organization. Apply standardized naming conventions and folder structures. Convert formats when needed (PDF merge/split, image-to-PDF, compressing, version labeling). Maintain controlled libraries (final vs draft vs archived), including retention tags. Â Quality control Perform daily spot checks for duplicates, misfiles, missing pages, and unreadable scans. Flag exceptions and route them to the correct owner with clear notes. Maintain error logs and contribute to process improvements that reduce rework. Â Records governance & compliance Handle sensitive records with strict access controls and confidentiality. Follow retention schedules, legal hold instructions, and deletion/archival rules. Support audits by pulling records quickly and documenting

Contribute domain-specific expertise to guide the training and development of advanced AI models. Location: Remote Latin America Compensation: $2,000-$3,000/month Type: Contractor Hours: 9am - 6pm PST About Us eJam is a bootstrapped consumer products company that has built, scaled, and exited multiple brands — all without ever taking a dollar of outside capital. Our portfolio includes category leaders ranked at the top of Amazon, carried in major retailers nationwide, and sold across DTC, marketplaces, and every channel in between. We're not a startup hoping something works. We're a team that has done it repeatedly — taken products from zero to eight figures, landed them on retail shelves nationwide, and built real brands that consumers love. We operate like a holding company with the speed of a startup: small team, no bureaucracy, massive ownership. This is the place where you'll see the entire machine — sourcing, product development, packaging, manufacturing, compliance, marketing, marketplace strategy, retail — all under one roof. If you want to learn how consumer products actually get built and shipped at scale, there is no faster education than this. The Role We're looking for a Marketing Web Developer in Latin America to work directly with our marketing and CRO team in Santa Ana, California. You'll build the landing pages, Shopify sections, and A/B test variants that our marketing team runs paid traffic into — and you'll learn, page by page, why one version converts and another does not. This isn't a role where you get handed tickets and left alone. You'll join our standups, see the performance data on everything you build, and get direct feedback from the marketing team on everything you ship.
